description: Incode provides identity verification, biometric authentication, fraud prevention, and related onboarding/orchestration tools. Its platform supports web and mobile verification journeys, workflow-based onboarding, and OIDC-secured session flows.
summary: Incode exposes a documented REST/HTTP integration surface for its Omni identity-verification platform plus an OIDC authorization server used for OAuth2-secured workflow/session flows; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, CLI, or machine-readable OpenAPI spec URL was found.
